<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$RDPS$ = (Damage * Burst Count) / (Cooldown + Aim Time + (Firerate * Burst Count))
$GDPS$ = [[Splash Damage]] / Firerate
$HPS$ = Heal / Firerate
$RAM$ = Health / Spawnrate
$CE$ = Total Price / Combined DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 2750; 1350; 2750; 9650; 10000; 12500; 45000
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 2000; 1800; 2000; 7000; 10000; 15000; 35000
$FNC-DETECTION$ = ; ;
$FNC-PVP-DETECTION$ = ; ;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Explosive Experts; Upgraded Barracks; Improved Training; Riot Control; Air Transport; Enhanced Equipment
$FNC-PVP-UPGRADE$ = Explosive Experts; Upgraded Barracks; Improved Training; Riot Control; Air Transport; Enhanced Equipment
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 17196819847; 17196820389; 17196819964; 13019520315; 17196820108; 17196820275
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
$RREF$ = <ref name="rifledps">DPS is calculated as (Damage × Burst Count) ÷ (Cooldown + Aim Time + (Firerate × Burst Count)).</ref>
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="7" |Mercenary Base Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Range !! Unit Queue !! Buff
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 6 || 1 || N/A
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 1 || N/A
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 2 || N/A
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 2 || 10%
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 3 || 10%
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 3 || 12.5%
|-
| 6 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 3 || 15%
|}
</div>

{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="13" |[[Rifleman]] Stats
|-
! Level !! Health !! Damage !! Burst Count !! Spawnrate !! Firerate !! Cooldown !! Aim Time !! Lifespan !! Range !! Detections !! DPS$RREF$ !! Ram DPS
|-
| 0–2 || 40 || 6 || 6 || 30 || 0.15 || 1 || 0.35 || 150 || 20 || N/A || $RDPS$ || $RAM$
|-
| 3–5 || 80 || 9 || 8 || 30 || 0.15 || 1 || 0.35 || 150 || 24 || Hidden, Flying || $RDPS$ || $RAM$
|-
| 6 || 275 || 18 || 8 || 30 || 0.15 || 1 || 0.35 || 150 || 30 || Hidden, Flying || $RDPS$ || $RAM$
|}

{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="12" |[[Grenadier]] Stats
|-
! Level !! Health !! [[Splash Damage]] !! Spawnrate !! Firerate !! Defense !! Lifespan !! Range !! Explosion Range !! Detections !! DPS !! Ram DPS
|-
| 1–2 || 50 || 20 || 25 || 1.4 || N/A || 150 || 19 || 4.5 || Lead || $GDPS$ || $RAM$
|-
| 3–5 || 135 || 30 || 25 || 1.3 || N/A || 150 || 20 || 5 || Lead || $GDPS$ || $RAM$
|-
| 6 || 325 || 40 || 25 || 1.2 || 10% || 150 || 21.5 || 6 || Lead || $GDPS$ || $RAM$
|}

{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="15" |[[Riot Guard]] Stats
|-
! Level !! Health !! Damage !! Spawnrate !! Defense !! Firerate !! Lifespan !! Range !! Knockback Force !! Max Hits !! Charge Time !! Detections !! DPS !! Ram DPS
|-
| 4–5 || 800 || 50 || 40 || 10% || 1.5 || 75 || 4 || 15 || 10 || 4 || Hidden || $DPS$ || $RAM$
|-
|6 || 2,000 || 50 || 40 || 15% || 1 || 75 || 4 || 25 || 10 || 3 || Hidden || $DPS$ || $RAM$
|}

{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="12" |[[Field Medic]] Stats
|-
! Level !! Health !! Spawnrate !! Heal !! Max Targets !! Firerate !! Lifespan !! Range !! Shield Cooldown !! Detections !! Heal per Second !! Ram DPS
|-
| 5 || 300 || 30 || 15 || 8 || 0.2 || 150 || 35 || 15 || N/A || $HPS$ || $RAM$
|-
| 6 || 600 || 30 || 20 || 10 || 0.2 || 150 || 35 || 15 || N/A || $HPS$ || $RAM$
|}
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="7" |Mercenary Base Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Range !! Unit Queue !! Buff
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 6 || 1 || N/A
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 1 || N/A
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 2 || N/A
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 2 || 10%
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 3 || 10%
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 3 || 10%
|-
| 6 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 3 || 20%
|}
</div>

{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="14" |[[Rifleman]] Stats
|-
! Level !! Health !! Damage !! Burst Count !! Spawnrate !! Firerate !! Cooldown !! Aim Time !! Lifespan !! Limit !! Range !! Detections !! DPS$RREF$ !! Ram DPS
|-
| 0–2 || 40 || 6 || 6 || 45 || 0.15 || 1 || 0.35 || 150 || 10 || 20 || N/A || $RDPS$ || $RAM$
|-
| 3–5 || 80 || 9 || 8 || 40 || 0.15 || 1 || 0.35 || 150 || 10 || 24 || Hidden, Flying || $RDPS$ || $RAM$
|-
| 6 || 275 || 18 || 8 || 35 || 0.15 || 1 || 0.35 || 150 || 10 || 30 || Hidden, Flying || $RDPS$ || $RAM$
|}

{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="13" |[[Grenadier]] Stats
|-
! Level !! Health !! [[Splash Damage]] !! Spawnrate !! Firerate !! Defense !! Lifespan !! Limit !! Range !! Explosion Range !! Detections !! DPS !! Ram DPS
|-
| 1–2 || 50 || 28 || 40 || 1.75 || N/A || 240 || 7 || 18 || 3 || Lead || $GDPS$ || $RAM$
|-
| 3–5 || 125 || 50 || 40 || 1.5 || N/A || 240 || 7 || 19 || 4.5 || Lead || $GDPS$ || $RAM$
|-
| 6 || 300 || 80 || 40 || 1.25 || 10% || 240 || 7 || 20 || 4.5 || Lead || $GDPS$ || $RAM$
|}

{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="16" |[[Riot Guard]] Stats
|-
! Level !! Health !! Damage !! Spawnrate !! Defense !! Firerate !! Lifespan !! Limit !! Range !! Knockback Force !! Max Hits !! Charge Time !! Detections !! DPS !! Ram DPS
|-
| 4–5 || 800 || 50 || 50 || 10% || 1.5 || 75 || 4 || 4 || 15 || 10 || 4 || Hidden || $DPS$ || $RAM$
|-
|6 || 2,000 || 50 || 50 || 15% || 1 || 75 || 4 || 4 || 25 || 10 || 3 || Hidden || $DPS$ || $RAM$
|}

{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="13" |[[Field Medic]] Stats
|-
! Level !! Health !! Spawnrate !! Heal !! Max Targets !! Firerate !! Lifespan !! Limit !! Range !! Shield Cooldown !! Detections !! Heal per Second !! Ram DPS
|-
| 5 || 300 || 35 || 15 || 8 || 0.2 || 150 || 3 || 35 || 15 || N/A || $HPS$ || $RAM$
|-
| 6 || 600 || 30 || 20 || 10 || 0.2 || 150 || 3 || 35 || 15 || N/A || $HPS$ || $RAM$
|}
</tabber></div>
